name: Italian Minestrone Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice green pepper (4 oz)
2. Chop spinach (1 cup)
3. Peel and dice carrot (1 large)
4. Cook elbow macaroni (2 cups) according to package instructions
5. Dice celery stalks (4 stalks)
6. Drain and rinse 16 oz kidney beans (1 can)
7. Mince onion (1 medium), salt, pepper to taste
8. Grate Romano cheese (1 cup)
9. Use chicken broth (4 cups)
1. In a 3-quart saucepan, sauté green peppers (4 oz) and onion (1 medium) in butter until tender.
2. Add spinach (1 cup), carrot (1 large, diced), and celery stalks (4 stalks).
3. Pour in chicken broth (4 cups) and tomato sauce (1 can). Bring to a boil.
4. Stir in macaroni and kidney beans, then return to a boil.
5. Reduce heat and simmer for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Sprinkle Romano cheese on top before serving.
